description: Proof-of-done gate that makes AI agents prove a task is done before claiming it.
pre_install: # Ship a .cmd launcher that forwards to the bundled native PowerShell
# engine. %~dp0 resolves to this app dir, and cwd is preserved so
notes: v0.9.0 binds receipts to git state, makes the Stop hook policy-aware, and is tested on Windows PowerShell 5.1 + 7; native PowerShell engines done-gate.ps1 and stop-gate.ps1 ship too.
No Git Bash required — run directly with pwsh or powershell.
To enforce proof-of-done in Claude Code, wire the Stop hook in
